title: Lasiorrhiza modesta
taxonomy: Lasiorrhiza modesta is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae. The genus Lasiorrhiza is part of the tribe Podalyrieae. intro: Lasiorrhiza modesta, also known as the "Australian desert pea," is a flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to potentially aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis and cancer.
